message:
test(database,migration): add 29 E2E tests for SQLite lifecycle and migration config (bd-yzuk)

Tests cover: connection open/close/idempotent-close, CRUD operations,
parameterized queries with all value types, query_row, batch execute,
transaction commit/rollback/drop-auto-rollback, immediate and exclusive
transactions, transaction-scoped queries, error recovery (invalid SQL,
closed connection, constraint violations, mid-transaction errors),
SqliteValue/SqliteError display, and migration mode decisions, builder
lifecycle, feature enumeration, DualValue roundtrip, and config defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
